title: Potion Totems
description: This new type of totem provides you with the effects of certain potions, with the advantage that they do not deplete.
body:
# Potion Totems

This mod introduces a new type of totem - Potion Totems. This unique type of totem provides you with the effects of certain potions, with the advantage that they don't get depleted. Enjoy the benefits of various potion effects without worrying about running out, as these Potion Totems offer a sustainable and enduring solution for enhancing your gameplay experience.

## Potion totem
![Potion totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f12382684cbf601e836c4878b9846a153bcb02.png)
